title: English language requirements :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## English language requirements
For some visas you need to be able to speak and understand English. Find out how to meet the English language requirement for different visas.
- English language tests tool Use this tool to find out if the visa you are applying for has English language requirements. The search results include the minimum scores you need to get if you take an English language test.

## English language tests tool
Use this tool to find out if the visa you are applying for has English language requirements. The search results include the minimum scores you need to get if you take an English language test.
- English language requirements for an Accredited Employer Work Visa Find out how you can meet our English language requirements for the Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV), if you have been offered a role at ANZSCO or NOL skill level 3 to 5.

## English language requirements for an Accredited Employer Work Visa
Find out how you can meet our English language requirements for the Accredited Employer Work Visa (AEWV), if you have been offered a role at ANZSCO or NOL skill level 3 to 5.
- English language requirements for skilled residence visas Find out how you and your family can meet our English language requirements if you are applying for a skilled residence visa.

## English language requirements for skilled residence visas
Find out how you and your family can meet our English language requirements if you are applying for a skilled residence visa.
- English language test results for entrepreneurs and employees relocating to New Zealand Find out how you and your family can meet our English language requirements if you are applying for an entrepreneur visa or you are the employee of a business that is relocating to New Zealand.

## English language test results for entrepreneurs and employees relocating to New Zealand
Find out how you and your family can meet our English language requirements if you are applying for an entrepreneur visa or you are the employee of a business that is relocating to New Zealand.
- English language test results for an Active Investor Plus Visa Find out how you can meet our English language requirements for Active Investor Plus Visa applications made before 1 April 2025.

## English language test results for an Active Investor Plus Visa
Find out how you can meet our English language requirements for Active Investor Plus Visa applications made before 1 April 2025.
- English language requirements for business investor visas Find out how you can meet our English language requirements for business investor visa applications.

## English language requirements for business investor visas
Find out how you can meet our English language requirements for business investor visa applications.
- English language test results for residence from work Find out how you and your family can meet our English language requirements if you are applying for a residence from work visa.

## English language test results for residence from work
Find out how you and your family can meet our English language requirements if you are applying for a residence from work visa.
- English language test results for a Dependent Child Resident Visa Find out how to meet our English language requirements if you are applying for a Dependent Child Resident Visa.

## English language test results for a Dependent Child Resident Visa
Find out how to meet our English language requirements if you are applying for a Dependent Child Resident Visa.
- English language test results for a Parent Resident Visa Find out how you and your partner can meet our English language requirements if you are applying for a Parent Resident Visa.

## English language test results for a Parent Resident Visa
Find out how you and your partner can meet our English language requirements if you are applying for a Parent Resident Visa.
- English language requirements for some working holiday visas Find out how you can meet our English language requirements if you are applying for a working holiday visa.

## English language requirements for some working holiday visas
Find out how you can meet our English language requirements if you are applying for a working holiday visa.
- Meeting English language requirements For visas other than skilled residence visas, you may be able to use your English-speaking background to meet our English language requirements.

## Meeting English language requirements
For visas other than skilled residence visas, you may be able to use your English-speaking background to meet our English language requirements.
- Learning English for families of resident visa applicants For some visas, your partner and children aged 16 and older must show that they can speak and understand English. Find out how your family can get lessons.

## Learning English for families of resident visa applicants
For some visas, your partner and children aged 16 and older must show that they can speak and understand English. Find out how your family can get lessons.
